{"id":"wr-nat","title":"Draft withdrawal email to WA Dept of Ecology (SSDP 24-1040)","description":"Draft a formal email to Casey Vaughn at the Washington State Department of Ecology withdrawing the Shoreline Substantial Development Permit application (SSDP 24-1040) for the Wandering River Campground project.

## Context
- The LUPA appeal in Cowlitz County Superior Court is effectively dead (improper service, likely dismissed March 11)
- The project is caught between County conditions requiring guest-only access and Ecology requiring general public access — an irreconcilable conflict
- The decision is to wind down this project iteration and withdraw all pending permits
- Casey Vaughn is the Ecology contact who has been corresponding on this application

## What the email must accomplish
1. Formally request withdrawal of SSDP 24-1040
